caipirinha.name: Caipirinha
instructions:
Trim both ends off 1 lime and discard the ends; cut lime into wedges and transfer to a small highball or old-fashioned glass. Add 2 tsp. sugar and muddle it into the lime wedges. Pour in 2–2½ oz cachaça and stir. Add crushed ice and stir well. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in August 2004. Head this way for more of our favorite summer cocktails →

cajun-shrimp-and-andouille-nachos.name: Cajun Shrimp And Andouille Nachos
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add andouille and cook for 2 minutes. Add onion and cook for 2 minutes more. Add bell peppers and cook for 2 minutes more. Remove from heat and stir in celery.
Line a baking sheet with foil and place tortilla chips on top. Cover chips with the sausage mixture.

Place shrimp in a bowl; add oil and seafood seasoning. Stir to coat. Place shrimp in the same skillet and cook over medium-high heat for 3 minutes. Scatter shrimp on top of the sausage mixture. Sprinkle Colby Jack cheese over the nachos.
Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler to low. Broil nachos until cheese has melted, about 3 minutes.

campari-affogato-with-lemon-sorbet.name: Campari Affogato With Lemon Sorbet
instructions: Mix Campari and orange juice in a small bowl.
Divide sorbet among 4 small serving bowls or coffee cups.
Pour 2 Tbsp. Campari mixture into each bowl.
Top with orange zest.

capricciosa-salad-argiro.name: Capricciosa Salad

ingredients.item: 160 gritted mixed green-ola green and rocket
160 gritted mixed green-ola green and rocket

instructions: Clean the cars and cut them along with mandolin in thin, wide stripes, like papardelles.
In a salad pot, add the green Lola, red Lola and the rocket into large pieces. Add the leaves from baby spinach.
Place the betrot in slices and carrot strips, and sprinkle with the pomegranate and almond fillets.
Beat all the actors for the dressing and pour the salad.
Mix well and serve immediately.

caramel-apple-snacking-cake.name: Caramel Apple Snacking Cake

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: preferably Granny Smith, peeled, grated on the large holes of a box grater

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Line bottom and sides of an 8x8" baking dish with parchment paper. Whisk 1 cup (125 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. ground cinnamon (if using) in a medium bowl.

Melt ⅓ cup (5 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp.) unsalted butter in a small skillet over low heat, then pour into a large bowl; reserve skillet. Add ½ cup (100 g) light brown sugar, ½ cup (100 g) granulated sugar, and 1 tsp. vanilla extract to large bowl and whisk to combine. Whisk in 2 large eggs. Add dry ingredients and whisk until mostly combined. Add 3 large apples, preferably Granny Smith, peeled, grated on the large holes of a box grater, and whisk until apples are distributed and no spots of dry flour remain. Scrape batter into prepared baking dish; smooth top.

Bake cake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 30–35 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan. Invert cake onto a plater and remove parchment paper. (Turning the cake bottom side up ensures a nice flat surface for glazing.)

Just before serving, melt remaining 2 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. unsalted butter in reserved skillet over medium heat; cook, stirring constantly, until milk solids are deep brown, about 3 minutes. Add ¼ cup heavy cream, a pinch of kosher salt, and remaining ½ cup (100 g) light brown sugar. Stirring constantly, bring mixture to a boil and cook until slightly thickened and sugar is melted, 1–2 minutes (an instant-read thermometer should register 225°). Pour glaze over cake and spread to edges with an offset spatula. Sprinkle flaky sea salt over.
Let glaze cool at least 5 minutes before cutting cake into squares.

caramelized-onion-and-gouda-stuffed-chic.name: Caramelized Onion And Gouda Stuffed Chicken
instructions: Melt butter in a skillet over medium-low heat. Add onions and saute until golden brown, stirring frequently. Continue cooking over medium-low heat until onions turn deeper brown, 35 to 45 minutes. If they start to burn, reduce heat. When completely caramelized, remove skillet from heat.
Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a rimmed baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Cut a pocket into the side of each chicken breast. Evenly stuff pockets with 1 or 2 slices of Gouda cheese (depending on size of breast) and 1 tablespoon caramelized onions.
Place seasoned coating mix in a shallow dish. Evenly dip each chicken breast in coating mix and place on prepared baking sheet.

Bake in preheated oven until chicken breasts are no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, 20 to 30 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

carbonara-with-chicken-in-the-oven-argir.name: Carbonara With Chicken In The Oven
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200oC and brush a medium refractory bowl with butter.
Cut each chicken fillet in half.
In a pan add 1 tablespoon butter and 1 tablespoon olive oil and sauteé the Chicken for 3-4′ on each side.
Add salt and pepper.
Remove the Chicken on a platter, allow it to cool and finely chop.
In the same pan, add 2 tabletspons of butter and sauté the mushrooms for 3 minutes to drink their liquids.
Add the onion and garlic and sauce for 3′. Add salt and pepper and put the wine out.
Allow the liquids to Evaporate for about 2′.
Add the parsley.
Add the mushrooms and talk to the bowl with the Chicken and mix.
Heat the butter in a pot to melt and add the flower.
Mixing with wire, baking for 2′ and drawing from the fire.
Add the warm broth and milk, starring.
Return to the fire and let it wind lightly.
Check the salt and rub nutmeg.

carnival-corn-teleculinaria.name: Carnival Corn
instructions: Season the ribs with thick salt and let it rest in the cold overnight. In the day, take a pot to the fire with water, pass the stump by water, add it to the pot, also add the chicken, chambão and the sausages and let cook. Remove the meats as they get cooked and book them in a warm place.

Peel the potatoes and carrots. Wash the corn well in cold water until white. Correct the salt to the cooking water, remove 1,5 L for another pot, take it to the fire, let it boil, gather the corns, stir until boiling and then let it boil for 20 minutes.

Add the potatoes and carrots to the pot where you cooked the meat, add more water until it covers well, correct the salt, take it to the fire and let it cook until cooked. Cut the meats and sausages into pieces, heat them again and serve with the potatoes and carrots and follow the corns.

carrot-salad-with-citrus-dressing-argiro.name: Carrot Salad With Citrus Dressing

ingredients.item: The green leaves of Tender fresh versions
The green leaves of Tender fresh versions

instructions: Rub the carrots in the cutter or in a thick grutter.
Place them in a bowl.
Add the green onion leaves, raisin, almond and fresh ginger.
Add some orange zest.
Add half orange juice to the salad.
Add some salt into the carrot salad.
Mix to marinate the ingredients until we prepare the dressing of the salad.
In a bowl, add all the indoors for the dressing and beat lightly with a wire.
We pour the carrot salad.
Mix and allow to marinate in the refrigerator for 30′′.
We serve her cool.

carrot-coconut-soup-with-harissa-and-cri.name: Carrot-coconut Soup With Harissa And Crispy Leeks

ingredients.prep: white and pale-green parts only, 1 chopped, 1 thinly sliced

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high heat. Add carrots, apple, onion, chopped leek, garlic, and ginger, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring often, until vegetables are beginning to soften, 5–7 minutes. Add broth, coconut milk, and 1 cup water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until vegetables are very tender, 20–25 minutes; let cool slightly. Working in batches, puree soup in a blender until smooth.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a small skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced leek and cook, stirring often, until golden and crisp, about 5 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain; season with salt.
Serve soup topped with harissa and crispy leeks.

caterpillar-cake.name: Caterpillar Cake
instructions: Prepare cake according to package instructions and bake in a Bundt pan. Cool and invert onto cutting board.
Cut a piece of cardboard large enough to accommodate two Bundt pans. Cover with aluminum foil.
Carefully cut the cake in half and place on cardboard in an 'S' shape.
Decorate with colored icing, candies, etc.

cauliflower-stew-argiro.name: Cauliflower Stew
instructions: Clean the cauliflower, cut it into pieces, Wash it and drag it well.
Clean and cut the potatoes into large bites or quinces.
Place them in a pot with oil and place them on low heat for 10-12 minutes, stringing from time to time, until they become transparent and start softening.
Add the onion, dry and fresh, and sauce for 5 minutes.
Add the paste and mix to make a little and remove its flavors.
Heat in a pan a little olive oil and add the cauliflower pieces.
Then add them to the pot with the potatoes.
Add the spice, Laurel, some salt, some pepper and water that half covers the potatoes.
Cook over medium heat for 15 minutes.
We don't mix, because the materials will melt. Instead, whenever necessary, shake the pot from the handles.
Check and correct salt and pepper. Turn off the heat and let the food stand for 10 minutes, so that the potatoes pull the sauce and stay lost with the oil.
It is eaten as a light meal with feta cheese and crisp bread or served very nicely with rice.

chana-masala-indian-chickpea-curry-peque.name: Chana Masala (indian Chickpea Curry)

1 teaspoon of cumin seeds (you can buy here)

In a mortar we pat garlic with ginger, ginger, a chorrit of lemon juice and half a teaspoon of salt.

In a frying pan we warm up the oil and revoked the seeds from cumin with low heat for a few seconds. We put in the chopped onion and we revoke till clear. We add the pallet, the ground cilantro seeds, the turmeric and the masala garham, we mix and cook a few seconds. We add the tomato and we break them with the fork, let them cook 3 or 4 minutes.

charcuterie-board.name: Charcuterie Board

ingredients.item: White cheddar sticks wrapped in spicy salami

instructions: Clean and prepare all fruits and vegetables.
Set out a large round or square wooden board. Start in the center and arrange cheese, meats, vegetables, and fruits in a decorative pattern.

charlie-brown-pie.name: Charlie Brown Pie

ingredients.item: Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Place peanut butter in a microwave-safe bowl; heat in microwave until smooth and creamy, 20 to 30 seconds. Stir graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and butter into peanut butter until evenly combined. Transfer to a 9x13-inch baking dish and press to form a crust. Refrigerate until chilled, about 2 hours.
Beat milk and pudding mix together in a bowl until thick and creamy; pour over crust. Top pie with whipped topping to serve.

charred-eggplant-and-tahini-spread.name: Charred Eggplant And Tahini Spread

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 475°. Place eggplant on a baking sheet and toss with ¼ cup oil; season with salt and pepper. Roast until lightly charred and very tender, 20–25 minutes; let cool slightly. Chop eggplant (skin and all) until almost a paste.
Mix eggplant in a medium bowl with garlic, lemon zest, lemon juice, tahini, and cumin; season with salt and pepper. Drizzle with oil and top with sesame seeds.

cheesy-garlic-broccoli.name: Cheesy Garlic Broccoli
instructions: Preheat oven to 375ºF (190ºC).
Spread out broccoli in a medium rectangular casserole dish.
Stir the garlic and cheddar cheese together in a separate bowl.
Sprinkle the cheese evenly over broccoli and add salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 25 minutes.
Enjoy!

cheesy-grilled-bread.name: Cheesy Grilled Bread
instructions: {'level': 'Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.', 'step': 1}

{'level': 'Combine butter, tomatoes, pesto, garlic, salt, and black pepper in a food processor. Pulse until thoroughly combined and tomatoes are chopped. Scrape into a bowl and stir in 1 cup shredded provolone cheese.', 'step': 2}
{'level': 'Grill bread on the preheated grill until toasted, about 1 1/2 minutes.', 'step': 3}
{'level': 'Spread butter mixture equally onto cut sides of both halves of bread and sprinkle with remaining cheese.', 'step': 4}
{'level': 'Grill bread, cut-side up, over indirect heat with grill covered, until topping melts, 8 to 10 minutes.', 'step': 5}

cheesy-pesto-twists.name: Cheesy Pesto Twists
instructions: Preheat oven to 350˚F (180°C).

Roll out a sheet of puff pastry and spread the pesto evenly over it, leaving a small amount of room at the edges. Sprinkle over the mozzarella and place another sheet of puff pastry on top, making a sandwich.
Cut into thin strips with a sharp knife. Grab both ends of each strip, press down firmly to seal the edges and twist.
Transfer onto a baking tray lined with baking paper, and brush with beaten egg. Season with salt and pepper and sprinkle over the parmesan.
Bake for 25 minutes until golden brown.
Enjoy!

cheesy-tuna-and-zucchini-noodle-casserol.name: Cheesy Tuna And Zucchini Noodle Casserole

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place spiralized zucchini (zoodles) into a pot and cover with well salted water; bring to a boil. Boil for 3 to 4 minutes, then empty into a colander to drain. Let drain for 2 to 3 hours, occasionally pressing out as much moisture as you can.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Lightly spray a 9x13-inch glass casserole with cooking spray and add drained zoodles.
Bake zoodles in the preheated oven for 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion and cook until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and cook until softened, about 1 minute. Add cream cheese and cook until softened, about 2 minutes.

Remove zoodles from the oven and pour off any liquid. Add the skillet mixture to the zoodles, along with tuna, peas, Cheddar cheese, salt, and pepper. Stir until well combined. Sprinkle almonds on top.
Bake until cheese is melted and bubbly, about 30 minutes.

chef-johns-irish-soda-bread.name: Chef John's Irish Soda Bread
instructions: Whisk all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, oats, salt, baking soda, and baking powder together in a large bowl. Cut butter into flour mixture using a pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.

Beat buttermilk, egg, honey, and orange zest together in a medium bowl. Pour buttermilk mixture, currants, and raisins into flour-butter mixture; stir with a wooden spoon until a wet, sticky dough comes together.
Turn dough out onto a well-floured work surface; press dough together into a ball and cut into 2 equal pieces. Form each into a smooth, round loaf.
Transfer to the prepared baking sheet and let rest for 15 minutes. Cut a 1/2-inch-deep 'X' into the top of each loaf using a serrated knife.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown and fragrant, about 45 minutes. Transfer loaves to a wire rack to cool completely before slicing.
Enjoy!

chef-johns-yucatan-style-grilled-pork.name: Chef John's Yucatan-style Grilled Pork
instructions: Place orange juice, lemon juice, and lime juice in a bowl. Add garlic, kosher salt, annatto powder, chipotle powder, ground cumin, cayenne, oregano, and black pepper. Whisk until well blended.

Cut the tenderloins in half crosswise; cut each piece in half lengthwise. Place pieces in marinade and thoroughly coat with the mixture. Cover with plastic wrap with the wrap touching the surface of the meat and marinade. (Or transfer mixture to a resealable plastic bag.) Refrigerate 4 to 6 hours.
Transfer pieces of pork from marinade to a paper-towel-lined bowl to absorb most of the moisture. Discard paper towels. Drizzle vegetable oil and a bit more annatto powder on the pork.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.

Place pieces evenly spaced on a hot grill. Allow meat to sear onto the grate until pieces can be easily turned, 4 or 5 minutes. Turn and grill on the other side another 4 or 5 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 135 to 60°C (63 degrees C). Transfer onto a serving platter and allow meat to rest about 5 minutes before serving.

chef-silvas-indian-meatballs-teleculinar.name: Chef Silva's Indian Meatballs
instructions: Mix the meat well with chopped onion, salt, ginger, pepper, saffron, coriander seeds and half yogurt and form small balls.
Pass them through the rest of the yogurt and then through the flour. Fry them in a pot with abundant oil, pour them on absorbent paper and serve them with basmati rice.

cherry-lemonade-beach-pie.name: Cherry Lemonade Beach Pie

ingredients.item: Ritz crackers (about 1 0.333 sleeves) or 45 saltine crackers
Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Pulse 43 Ritz crackers (about 1⅓ sleeves) or 45 saltine crackers (about 1¼ sleeves) in a food processor until crumbs are very small; no pieces should be bigger than a lentil. (Alternatively, place in a resealable plastic bag and crush with a rolling pin.) Transfer crumbs to a medium bowl; add ¼ cup (50 g) sugar and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt and stir to combine. Drizzle in 1 large egg white and 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted, slightly cooled, and toss to coat thoroughly. Transfer to a 9"-diameter pie pan. Using a flat-bottomed measuring cup, firmly and evenly press into bottom and up sides of pan. Bake crust until golden brown, 18–20 minutes. Let cool slightly.

Meanwhile, vigorously whisk 4 large egg yolks and one 14-oz. can sweetened condensed milk until well combined. Add 1 tsp. finely grated lemon zest, ⅔ cup fresh lemon juice, and remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt.
Pour filling into crust and bake until edges are set but center still jiggles slightly when pie is gently shaken, 15–20 minutes. Let cool.

Heat ⅓ cup cherry jam and 1 Tbsp. maraschino cherry syrup in a small saucepan over medium, stirring occasionally, until runny, about 2 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a measuring glass or small heatproof bowl; discard solids. Let jam mixture cool slightly.
Drizzle jam mixture over center of pie, then carefully tilt pie in a rolling fashion to evenly coat filling (be careful not to let it run over into the crust). Chill pie until cold, at least 2 hours.

Top with maraschino cherries as desired just before serving.
Do Ahead: Pie can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

chestnut-jam-teleculinaria.name: Chestnut Jam
instructions: Put the chestnuts in a pot, cover them with water and take them to the fire with cinnamon stick, lemon peel and sugar.
Also season with a pinch of nutmeg and salt and the fennel and let cook, in low heat, stirring from time to time, until you get the consistency of jam.
At that time, remove from the fire, discard the cinnamon stick and the lemon peel and trim slightly, leaving some small pieces of chestnut. Put it in bottles and close well.

chewy-halwa-cookies.name: Chewy Halwa Cookies

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat 1 cup (2 sticks) unsalted butter in a large skillet over medium until almost melted. Add ½ cup sliced almonds and cook, stirring often with a wooden spoon or heatproof rubber spatula, until milk solids in butter are deep golden brown and almonds are golden brown, 5–7 minutes. Add 4 medium carrots (about 8 oz.), peeled, coarsely grated, 1½ tsp. ground cardamom, and 2 Tbsp. granulated sugar and cook, stirring often, until carrots are softened and reduced in volume by one third, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl and let cool until lukewarm.
Meanwhile, whisk together 1¾ cups (219 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¾ tsp. baking soda in a medium bowl.

Mix 1 cup (packed; 200 g) dark brown sugar and remaining ¼ cup granulated sugar into carrot mixture, then add 2 large eggs, one at a time, mixing after each addition until combined. Add dry ingredients; stir until no dry streaks remain. Cover dough and chill in refrigerator at least 30 minutes and up to 12 hours.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to
375°. Place some almonds in a small bowl. Remove dough from refrigerator and scoop out
3-tablespoonful portions. Roll into smooth balls, then roll in almonds to coat. Divide
between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing about 2" apart.

Bake cookies rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until golden brown around the edges, 13–15 minutes. Remove from oven and firmly tap baking sheets on counter. Sprinkle cookies with flaky sea salt; let cool on baking sheets at least 5 minutes.
Do ahead: Cookies can be baked 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

chicken-argiro.name: Chicken
instructions: First we Wash the liver and intestines very well.
Turn the studies inside out and Wash them very well under running water.
Allow them to draw well (optionally squeeze lemon into the counterria and leave it in the refrigerator to whiteen).
Cut the liver into large pieces, like big bites. The spleen, we always keep it to make splenander.
In a bowl, add salt and pepper.

In small suvla, we pass 2-3 pieces of liver (alternative liver, lung, heart) and in between we add the Sweets – bowling, alternatively with bits of lups that will help the cokoreche to keep animation and not dry.
After passing all the interredients into the souvla, add salt and pepper again.
We dip the bowl in lukewarm water to open well.
Spread it on the cutting board.
Touch the skater with the romelotiko cokoresi and careful wrap the bowl around them, covering it complete.

Fasten the instinctine from one end of the skater to the other and wrap it hard around the cokoreche. It's very essential that all the snacks in the cokorechi are covered by an agent because anyone who excels burns.
Fix the instinctine well.

Bake it on the streets, placing it at first high from the fire, about 40 cm away, until it is simmed inside and when it starts to brown we lower it close to the fire, it is about 15 cm away, until well golden.

chicken-and-mushrooms-with-giant-crouton.name: Chicken And Mushrooms With Giant Croutons

ingredients.item: Skin-on chicken pieces (any combination of drumsticks

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Season chicken generously with salt and pepper. Heat 2 Tbsp. butter in a large skillet over medium. Cook chicken, skin side down, until skin is deep golden brown, 10–12 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
Add bread slices to skillet. Cook, pressing down and turning halfway through, until bread is golden brown, 5–8 minutes. Transfer croutons to a serving platter.

Add remaining 2 Tbsp. butter and mushrooms to pan and season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing often, until mushrooms are golden brown, 5–8 minutes. Add onion and thyme and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is translucent, about 5 minutes. Add flour and cook, stirring, until onion is coated and bottom of skillet is golden brown, about 2 minutes. Add wine and cook, stirring and scraping up browned bits, until skillet is almost dry, about 2 minutes. Add broth and return chicken to skillet, skin side up; bring to a simmer. Transfer skillet to oven and bake until chicken is cooked through, 15–20 minutes. Arrange chicken on top of croutons.

Place skillet over medium heat and cook pan juices, stirring occasionally, until thick enough to coat a spoon, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream; season sauce with salt, pepper, and hot sauce. Pluck out thyme and spoon sauce over and around chicken; top with parsley.

chicken-enchiladas.name: Chicken Enchiladas

ingredients.item: Homemade chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth
Ground chile de árbol or red pepper flakes

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Drizzle olive oil over onion, poblano chile, and tomatillos on a rimmed baking sheet and roast until vegetables are soft and browned, 35–40 minutes. Let cool slightly, then slip off and discard poblano skin. Transfer onion mixture and any accumulated juices to a blender. Add serrano chiles, garlic, chicken stock, cilantro, and lime juice and purée until smooth. Transfer to a large bowl, then season green sauce with salt.
Preheat oven to 425°. Toss chicken with coriander, chile de árbol, and ½ cup green sauce in a large bowl; season with salt.

Heat vegetable oil in a medium skillet over medium-high until oil bubbles immediately when edge of tortilla touches the surface. Working one at a time, fry tortilla, turning once, until just starting to brown and crisp, about 10 seconds per side. Transfer tortilla to paper towels to drain. Repeat with remaining tortillas.

Dip both sides of each tortilla in green sauce just to coat, then transfer to a rimmed baking sheet. Spread 1 cup green sauce lengthwise down the center of a 13x9" baking dish. Working one at a time, spread ¼ cup chicken mixture down the center of tortilla and fold one side over filling, then continue to roll enchilada onto itself. Place seam side down in prepared baking dish as you go (enchiladas should be nestled right up against each other). Top with 10 oz. cheese and remaining green sauce. Bake until sauce is bubbling and cheese is beginning to brown, 20–25 minutes. Let sit 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine crème fraîche and milk; season with salt.
Serve enchiladas topped with cheese, a drizzle of crema, and sliced onion.

2. Take 2 cups from boiling water.

chicken-salad-with-yogurt-argiro.name: Chicken Salad With Yogurt
instructions: Place the Chicken fillets in a pot and cover with water. Bring to a boat and skim well the first few minutes.
Once it is shaded, cover the pot and bottle over medium heat for about 25 minutes. Turn off the heat and place the Chicken in the pot for 10 more minutes with the lid closed.
Drain the Chicken (keep the broth for another use) and allow it to cool. Then, chop it or check it with two forks.
Fine chop all the vegetarians and herbs.
In a large bowl, add the chopped chicken, vegetarians, yogurt, lemon juice, vintage, salt and pepper.
Mix well until the mixture is homogenized.
Sprinkle with the pumpkin seed, pomegranate and fresh herbs.
Serve on slides of green apple. Inside cabbage leaves or iceberg like “wraps”.
On sticks from saddlery, for lower-carb selection.

chicken-steaks-breaded-with-almonds-tele.name: Chicken Steaks Breaded With Almonds
chicken-steaks-breaded-with-almonds-tele.original_name: Bifes de frango panados com amêndoa
instructions: Cut the chicken into steaks and season them with chopped garlic teeth, lemon juice, salt and pepper. Let it marinate for an hour.
After the time indicated, pass the steaks by flour, the eggs beaten and finally the almond rolled.
Fry the steaks in hot oil on both sides. Drain them, put them on a tray and put them in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 15 minutes.
Prepare the rice: peel and pinch the onion and garlic and praise them in a pot with olive oil and blond. Add the carrot, previously grated or cut into very small pieces, and stir.
Add the rice, wrap and then add the hot water. Season with salt and pepper, stir, cover and let cook. Serve as an accompaniment to the bread steaks.

chicken-tortilla-bowl-soup.name: Chicken Tortilla Bowl Soup
instructions: Place diced onion, jalapeno and garlic in the bottom of a slow cooker.
Place the chicken breasts on top of the veggies.
Add all canned ingredients and seasonings to the chicken in the slow cooker. Top with the chicken stock.
Set slow cooker to high and cook for 3 hours.
Fill a large pot ⅔ full with vegetable oil and heat until it reaches 177°C (180°C).
Carefully place the tortilla on top of the oil and gently press the tortilla down with a ladle. Fry tortilla until golden brown. Drain on a cooling rack.
When soup is done, remove chicken and dice it on a cutting board.  Return diced chicken to the soup.
Place fried tortilla bowl in a soup bowl and fill it with the soup.
Top it off with cheese, avocado, cilantro and garnish with a lime wedge.
Enjoy!!

chicken-with-creamy-realemon-sauce.name: Chicken With Creamy Realemon® Sauce
instructions: Rinse chicken; pat dry. Combine 1/4 cup flour, salt, and pepper in a plastic bag. Add chicken, a few at a time, shaking to coat.

Cook chicken in hot margarine or butter in large skillet over medium-high heat 8 to 10 minutes or until tender and no longer pink, turning once. Reduce heat as necessary during cooking to prevent overbrowning. Remove from skillet, reserving any drippings. Keep warm.

For sauce, combine broth and 3 tablespoons flour in screw-top jar. Cover and shake well; add to skillet. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Cook and stir 1 minute longer. Stir in ReaLemon® and sugar; heat through. Serve sauce over chicken. Sprinkle with chives.

chicken-with-pea-puree-teleculinaria.name: Chicken With Pea Puree
chicken-with-pea-puree-teleculinaria.original_name: Frango rápido com puré de ervilhas
instructions: Cut the chicken breasts into not too thick strips, season with salt and pepper and book.

In a microwave container, mix the onion, previously peeled and cut into half-moons, pepper, cut into strips, peeled and chopped garlic, blonde, oregano, wine, vinegar and tomato pulp. Mix well, add the chicken strips and book.
Prepare the pea puree: bake the peas in a pot with water and salt for 15 to 20 minutes. Take it back and run. Season with pepper to taste, add the milk and crush with the magic wand. Reserve.

Cover the container of the attached chicken and take to the microwave for 15 minutes at maximum power, stirring from time to time. Remove, follow the pea puree, sprinkle with chopped chives and serve.

chicken-asparagus-and-wild-mushroom-stir.name: Chicken, Asparagus, And Wild Mushroom Stir-fry

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breasts, cut into 1/2 inch strips

ingredients.item: Piment d'espelette or a pinch of cayenne pepper
Dry white wine or dry vermouth

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add asparagus; season with salt and toss to evenly coat asparagus with oil. Add 3 Tbsp. water, cover, and steam until water evaporates and asparagus is just tender, 4–5 minutes. Transfer asparagus to a medium bowl.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in same skillet. Add mushrooms; season with salt and sauté until tender, 8–10 minutes. Transfer mushrooms to another medium bowl. Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in same skillet. Add shallot and garlic and sauté until just tender, about 2 minutes. Add chicken; season with salt and sprinkle with piment d'Esplette. Sauté until chicken is almost cooked through, 4–6 minutes. Add wine and cream; bring to a boil and cook until sauce thickens slightly, about 2 minutes. Return asparagus and mushrooms to skillet and toss until coated. Season to taste with salt and black pepper.

chickpea-salad-10-and-healthy-recipes-pe.name: Chickpea Salad (10 And Healthy Recipes)
chickpea-salad-10-and-healthy-recipes-pe.original_name: Ensalada de garbanzos (10 recetas fáciles y sanas)

instructions: We put the chickpeas into a bowl We cut into small pieces the red pepper, green pepper and onions. We put into the bowl and mix well. We also add cherry tomato cut into 4 pieces each tomato.
Now we put both cans of seawold tuna in if you care about added olives at this time cut into pieces.

In a small boat with cover we add vinegar next to salt and pepper, close the boat and shake well. Below we add extra virgin olive oil, awat again to join all ingredients, we reserve. We cook the egg for 11 minutes, carefully remove the skin and add the egg cut into pieces to the vinegar, we reserve.
Before we serve we have to mingle with the vinegar we have prepared. We can put them in the refrigerator and let them stand to intensify their flavors, or serve them immediately.
